query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'services' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%unbill%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%active%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%exclude%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%ignore%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'services' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%unbill%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%active%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%exclude%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%ignore%');
